title: Refactoring Challenge
subtitle: Apply the Builder pattern yourself. Fix the bad code.

challenges.title: Extract a Builder from Telescoping Constructor
challenges.description: This Order class has a 10-parameter constructor. Refactor it to use Builder pattern with fluent API and validation.
hints: Create a static inner Builder class
Move all parameters to fluent setters
validationChecks: Builder is a static inner class

challenges.title: Fix Immutability Leaks
challenges.description: This Builder creates a 'immutable' Product, but there are 3 immutability leaks. Find and fix them all.
hints: Check if collections are defensively copied
Check if Product has any setters
Check if getters return mutable references

challenges.title: Combine Builder + Factory for Notifications
challenges.description: Design a system where Factory picks the right Builder based on notification channel, and each Builder has channel-specific validation. Push supports images, SMS doesn't. Email supports HTML body, SMS is plain text only.
hints: Create a NotificationBuilder interface with common setters
PushBuilder, EmailBuilder, SmsBuilder implement it with channel-specific rules
validationChecks: SMS rejects title and limits body to 160
